title: 谷歌Gemini进军科学界：一日两篇Nature论文，AlphaFold只是开胃菜
description: 谷歌将科学研究的三大核心瓶颈——假设生成、计算发现和文献洞察——分解为AI可以深度辅助的三个模块，并在同一天发表两篇《Nature》论文来支撑前两个阶段。
titleZh: 谷歌Gemini进军科学界：一日两篇Nature论文，AlphaFold只是开胃菜
titleEn: Google Gemini Enters the Scientific World: Two Papers in Nature in One Day, AlphaFold Just the Appetizer
descriptionZh: 谷歌将科学研究的三大核心瓶颈——假设生成、计算发现和文献洞察——分解为AI可以深度辅助的三个模块，并在同一天发表两篇《Nature》论文来支撑前两个阶段。
descriptionEn: Google breaks down the three core bottlenecks of scientific research—hypothesis generation, computational discovery, and literature insight—into three modules that AI can deeply assist with, and publishes two Nature papers on the same day to support the first two stages.

title: 信用最大化：OpenAI 1800 亿美元芯片野心陷入与微软的单一采购合同
description: OpenAI与博通联手打造芯片，希望打破对英伟达的唯一依赖，但在关键的一步，仍然被微软掐住了。
titleZh: 信用最大化：OpenAI 1800 亿美元芯片野心陷入与微软的单一采购合同
titleEn: Credit Maxed Out: OpenAI’s $180 Billion Chip Ambition Stuck on a Single Procurement Contract with Microsoft
descriptionZh: OpenAI与博通联手打造芯片，希望打破对英伟达的唯一依赖，但在关键的一步，仍然被微软掐住了。
descriptionEn: OpenAI teams up with Broadcom to build chips, hoping to break its sole reliance on Nvidia, but at a critical step, it’s still being choked by Microsoft.

title: 前DeepMind研究员辞职宣称：整个AI行业方向错误
description: 一位前谷歌 DeepMind 研究员辞职并发表了一篇长文，指出当今人工智能行业最被低估的瓶颈。
titleZh: 前DeepMind研究员辞职宣称：整个AI行业方向错误
titleEn: Former DeepMind Researcher Quits and Declares: The Entire AI Industry Has the Wrong Direction
descriptionZh: 一位前谷歌 DeepMind 研究员辞职并发表了一篇长文，指出当今人工智能行业最被低估的瓶颈。
descriptionEn: A former Google DeepMind researcher resigns and publishes a lengthy post pointing out the most underestimated bottleneck in the AI industry today. He argues that existing benchmarks and safety assessments implicitly assume the next-generation model is merely an enhanced version of the current one, but if models enter entirely new capability ranges, the entire evaluation infrastructure will quietly collapse.

description: 更大的智能体群体需要机器组织心理学的基础。
titleZh: 多智能体很热门，但人工智能的组织功能障碍仍未得到解决

descriptionZh: 更大的智能体群体需要机器组织心理学的基础。
descriptionEn: Larger agent swarms need a foundation in machine organizational psychology.

title: AlphaGo之父将AI扔进23年的人工社会：智能体最严峻的三大挑战都在这里
description: 从 Atari 到 AlphaGo，从 AlphaStar 到 SIMA，DeepMind 十多年来一直在利用游戏进行 AI 研究。
titleZh: AlphaGo之父将AI扔进23年的人工社会：智能体最严峻的三大挑战都在这里
titleEn: AlphaGo’s Father Drops AI into a 23-Year-Old Artificial Society: The Three Toughest Challenges for Agents Are All Here
descriptionZh: 从 Atari 到 AlphaGo，从 AlphaStar 到 SIMA，DeepMind 十多年来一直在利用游戏进行 AI 研究。
descriptionEn: From Atari to AlphaGo, from AlphaStar to SIMA, DeepMind has spent over a decade using games for AI research. Every time it switches battlefields, the research questions escalate by an order of magnitude. This time, the battlefield is EVE Online: a living universe that has run for 23 years without ever being reset.

title: 纳德拉拆除微软旧王座，苏莱曼全面进攻超级智能
description: 纳德拉亲自推翻了微软旧有的领导层：服役30多年的老兵集体退出，甚至AI负责人苏莱曼也将Copilot交给了超级智能。
titleZh: 纳德拉拆除微软旧王座，苏莱曼全面进攻超级智能
titleEn: Nadella Dismantles Microsoft’s Old Throne, Suleiman Launches Total Assault on Superintelligence
descriptionZh: 纳德拉亲自推翻了微软旧有的领导层：服役30多年的老兵集体退出，甚至AI负责人苏莱曼也将Copilot交给了超级智能。
descriptionEn: Nadella personally tears down Microsoft’s old leadership: veterans with over 30 years of service exit en masse, and even AI chief Suleiman hands over Copilot to pivot toward superintelligence. Nadella aims to transform a 228,000-person giant into an AI-era startup. So far, no major company has proven this path is viable.

title: 人工智能生成的文章数量已经超过人类：人工智能为你写下一切——你的大脑还剩下什么？

titleEn: AI-Generated Articles Already Outnumber Human Ones: AI Writes Everything for You—What’s Left of Your Brain?
descriptionZh: 当人类停止写作时，人工智能也将停止进步。
descriptionEn: When humans stop writing, AI will stop improving too.

descriptionZh: 几乎在同一天，Anthropic的三名超级AI过早曝光！
descriptionEn: Almost on the same day, three of Anthropic's super AIs were prematurely exposed! Claude Opus 4.8 made a surprise appearance on Google's backend, while Sonnet 4.8 skipped ahead of version 4.7. Mythos 1, once touted as "too dangerous to release," has also emerged.
